memory:memory/2026-04-24.md:1:11.snippet: # Daily Notes - 🦞 Clawd: Initialized memory notes so indexing can run. # Daily Notes - 🦞 Clawd: Initialized memory notes so indexing can run. - 🦞 Clawd: Completed Hermes/Paperclip rollout workstream in Discord context, including creating 7 Hermes agents and role-based naming to reduce number-based confusion. - 🦞 Clawd: User preference confirmed: role-based labels are easier than numeric agent names ("cannot remember the numbers"). - 🦞 Clawd: Active issues reported by user: Hermes WebUI not accessible from their side, and Paperclip org structure felt too flat. - 🦞 Clawd: Explained likely Hermes access constraint: WebUI instances are local-only when bound to 127.0.0.1; offered LAN rebi
